description: Highlights from Breakpoint 2022, featuring discussions on Web3 education in Sierra Leone, NFT advocacy in Washington, and network cost reduction on Solana.
topic_summary: This episode compiles three talks: 1) Web3 School in Sierra Leone [t=34:39], focusing on blockchain education; 2) NFT advocacy in Washington [t=42:07]; 3) Network cost reduction through compression [t=50:71].
